message:
fix: update subscription cursor after sending missed/catchup messages

Ensure the subscription cursor is updated immediately after sending
each message during missed message replay and catchup delivery.

Changes in handlers.ts:
- Import channelToString helper
- After sending each missed message, update the subscription cursor
  with ws.data.subscriptions.set(channelStr, msg.cursor)

Changes in hub.ts:
- After sending each catchup message via broadcast, update the
  subscription cursor similarly

This prevents clients from receiving duplicate messages if they
reconnect before the cursor was updated. Previously the cursor
was only updated after processing acks, but clients that disconnected
during replay would miss the cursor advancement.

Also includes test updates and bead tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
